translation.literal_translation: And from what further reason is omniscient Brahman the cause of the world? -
translation.interpretive_note: Interrogative hinge continuing cumulative proof sequence.

lexical_notes.headword_iast: kutaś ca sarvajñaṃ brahma jagataḥ kāraṇam
lexical_notes.gloss: what establishes omniscient Brahman as world-cause?
lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Interrogative setup cues the move to explicit scriptural-hearing proof.
alternate_glosses: on what ground Brahman as cosmic cause?

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Transition indicates shift from contextual inference to explicit citation force.
Adds positive corroboration after prior rounds of opponent refutation.

lexical_notes.gloss: closing sequence of the topical unit
lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Signals the argument is approaching final seal through direct testimony.
